title: taraxacum pyrenaicum
intro: Taraxacum pyrenaicum, also known as Pyrenean dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is known to contain inulin, a prebiotic fiber that supports gut health. The health benefits of Taraxacum pyrenaicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and other gastrointestinal disorders.
